title: Campaign Outcome Contract
description: Output schema for campaign loop — defines the result after executing scenes within an arc

arc_complete.description: Whether the arc meets its completion criteria

scenes_executed.description: Number of scenes run in this dispatch

loot.description: Items and gold acquired during the arc

party_state.description: Mutations to apply to party state (HP, conditions, resources)

arc_state.description: Mutations to apply to arc state (quest progress, NPC dispositions)

campaign_state.description: Mutations to apply to campaign state (plot flags, faction standings)

state_changes.description: Mutations to apply across party, arc, and campaign state

next_arc_id.description: If arc is complete, the ID of the next arc to load
